---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for Kaysan AI
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you would like.

## Use Case

Describe the problem or use case this feature would solve.

## Proposed Solution

How you think this could be implemented.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request here.

## Difficulty

- [ ] Easy (good first issue)
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] Hard
